markdown:
<title level="1" right="Witch Lesson " pfs="Standard">[Lesson of the Elements](/Lessons.aspx?ID=17)</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 185

**Lesson Type** Basic

</column>

Natural disasters and inclement weather hold more power than the mightiest creature.
You gain the [Elemental Betrayal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1878) hex. Your familiar learns your choice of [_breathe fire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1457), [_gust of wind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=143), [_hydraulic push_](/Spells.aspx?ID=154), or [_pummeling rubble_](/Spells.aspx?ID=708).
name: Lesson of the Elements
text: Lesson of the Elements Source Player Core pg. 185 Lesson Type Basic Natural disasters and inclement weather hold more power than the mightiest creature. You gain the Elemental Betrayal hex. Your familiar learns your choice of breathe fire , gust of wind , hydraulic push , or pummeling rubble .
